name: The Great(er) Tomb of Nazarick [5k Special!]
description:
"My friends, what do you think about me hogging this glorious name? Will you be happy? Or displeased? Tell me if you have any feedback, tell me this name isn’t mine alone. I will change back and use Momonga without hesitation."

-Momonga, aka 'Ainz Ooal Gown'

Before I give you guys the short rundown of the bot, I wanted to say thank you again. I don't want to be redundant and reiterate what I said in the 1k special, but this is a special milestone for me. 5k in a few months is absolutely INSANE. But instead of thanking the same people again, I wanted to just tell you guys that I am appreciative of you all and remind you to join the Discord. Yeah, yeah, I shill it every bot, but I genuinely wanna interact with you guys.

+UPDATE: Slightly altered the intro so people stop commenting about inconsistencies that do not exist. The starting passage tells about the PAST, people. It is there for people who know nothing about Overlord, ffs

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

I am currently listening to the audiobooks of the novels (which is read by Ainz's english va, btw) so I got in the Overlord mood. Not to mention I watched the new movie! (Honestly I need to watch it a few more times before I say my opinions on it.) So I decided to remake one of my older and more ambitious Overlord bots! I did delete my old one, but honestly it's for the best since it is pretty bad compared to my modern stuff. I have truly tried to fit in as MUCH of the Tomb's lore as I could. In this I have:


-All of the Floors, including notable sub-areas such as the Amphitheater and the Treasury

-All the Floor Guardians (The Dark Elf twins have been aged up specifically to avoid breaking site TOS. That said I'm still going to judge you if you try anything with them)

-The Pleiades Battle Maids + Pandora's Actor

The lore OUTSIDE of the Tomb is unfortunately not in the bot itself, as it was getting pretty bloated even without it. That said, a good proxy can EASILY mitigate this issue. If you don't already have one, Cactuar made an amazing guide to help you get a free one that isn't half bad. Also, it helps if you try and add lore abt the world and characters in through your own messages. Like: "What about the Re-Estize kingdom to the East?" *I gripped my hands thinking of the Slane Theocracy, who already hated my kind.* or *I calmly approached Pandora's Actor, the eccentric and energetic Doppelganger.*

The VRMMO game, Yggdrasil, was innovative in the world of gaming. Using a special headset, it allowed players to fully immerse themselves into the beautifully crafted fantasy world. It was basically a near-limitless game of Dungeons and Dragons, with literal thousands of customization options! In this grand game was the guild of Ainz Ooal Gown, the 9th highest ranked guild of all. Though, it had fallen substantially in recent times. The game, after nearly a decade of world-wide play, had finally reached it's end. {{user}} had been the last one left in the Guild by the time the servers shut down, possibly the last player on the server itself. That day was monumental for many reasons. Of course, it meant the end of an era. The end of a time where {{user}} could simply relax and hop on a game alongside 40 others, the memories and proof of thei
creator: heehookatie
